title: Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
text: Comprehensive earnings forecast and reporting dates for Robinhood Markets in 2026. 2026 Earnings Schedule: Q1 2026: Reported April 28 (already released). Q2 2026: Expected late July 2026. Q3 2026: Expected late October 2026. Q4 2026: Expected February 2027. Historical Earnings Performance: 2024: Revenue $2.951B, EPS $1.56 (including one-time benefits). 2025: Revenue $4.5B, EPS $2.05 (strong growth year). 2026: Estimated revenue $5.1-5.3B, EPS $2.19 based on analyst consensus. Quarterly Trends: Q1 2026 showed deceleration due to crypto weakness but other segments healthy. Q2 2026 expected to show improvement with April data suggesting recovery. Forecast Drivers: Asset growth continuing at strong pace. Net deposits maintaining momentum. Transaction volumes rebounding post-PDT rule change. Gold subscriber growth acceleration. Product revenue diversification (prediction markets, futures, etc.). Earnings Risk Factors: Cryptocurrency market direction (highly leveraged to crypto). Trading volume cycles tied to market volatility. Competition and customer acquisition costs. Regulatory changes beyond PDT rule.
